work.name: Daylight Health
highlights: Built patient-facing eligibility verification flows using React and Node.js, reducing clinic workload by 40%.
Developed backend systems to process insurance data with real-time validation and file parsing (OCR, PDF).
Created internal tools used by clinicians to improve scheduling, intake, and documentation workflows.
Partnered with cross-functional teams including designers and clinicians to ship and iterate on features.

work.name: Core Extract
highlights: Built multi-stage document parsing system using Python, Rust, and ML to structure medical and administrative data.
Improved accuracy of structured outputs from PDFs by integrating layout models and domain-specific validation.

work.name: Michigan Geological Survey / WMU
highlights: Designed data dashboards and ingestion pipelines (React, Python, PostGIS) for carbon storage analysis projects.
Collaborated with researchers and government partners to optimize visualization and analysis of geospatial data.

work.name: PanAfrican Capital Holdings
highlights: Developed scalable frontend interfaces using TypeScript and Redux to improve user engagement and reporting clarity.
Supported backend coordination and systems integration with finance tools and enterprise services.

basics.name: Usman Ayobami
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Mission-driven software engineer with a strong foundation in full-stack development and a deep interest in applying technology to improve healthcare outcomes. Experienced building scalable web systems, AI-powered tools, and backend services with real-world impact. Adept at working across interdisciplinary teams and translating complex workflows into effective technical solutions.

projects.name: HealthDisparity AI
highlights: Designed end-to-end products with analytics and clean UX.
projects.description: Built an AI assistant recommending culturally competent care using React, Node.js, OpenAI.

projects.name: Core Extract
highlights: Focused on accuracy and robust failure handling.
projects.description: Developed a reliable AI pipeline to extract structured data from PDFs using Python, Rust, and OCR.
